	jnb 0E0h.7, jump_05A9
	setb 28h.0
jump_05A9:
	jb 0E0h.5, jump_05C5
	xrl A, #80h	; 128 -128
	jnz jump_05B3
	ljmp jump_E64A

jump_05B3:
	lcall jump_2FB8
	jc jump_05BB
	ljmp jump_E667

jump_05BB:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_EBC9
	movx A, @DPTR
	anl A, #15h	;  21
	jz jump_05C5
	setb 28h.1
jump_05C5:
	mov A, 08h
	jnz jump_05D7
	jb 28h.0, jump_05D7
	mov R1, #33h	;  51 '3'
	mov R2, #01h	;   1
	lcall jump_2FAC
	jc jump_05D7
	ajmp jump_066D

jump_05D7:
	lcall jump_2FBB
	jc jump_05DE
	ajmp jump_066D

jump_05DE:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_EBDD
	movx A, @DPTR
	anl A, #30h	;  48 '0'
	xrl A, #30h	;  48 '0'
	jz jump_05EA
	ajmp jump_066D

jump_05EA:
	mov R1, #00h	;   0
	mov DPTR, #dptr_FE45
	movx A, @DPTR
	anl A, #0F0h	; 240  -16 'ð'
	orl A, R1
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov R1, #00h	;   0
jump_05F6:
	mov R0, #2Dh	;  45 '-'
	lcall jump_2FA9
	mov DPTR, #dptr_FF08
jump_05FE:
	jnb 24h.5, jump_0608
	movx A, @DPTR
	jnb 0E0h.5, jump_05FE
	setb C
	sjmp jump_0609

jump_0608:
	clr C
jump_0609:
	jc jump_060D
	sjmp jump_0668

jump_060D:
	push 01h
	mov R6, #0F4h	; 244  -12 'ô'
	mov R7, #00h	;   0
	mov R5, #00h	;   0
	mov R4, #02h	;   2
	lcall jump_2FC1
	pop 01h
	jc jump_0627
	inc R1
	mov A, R1
	xrl A, #20h	;  32 ' '
	jnz jump_05F6
	ljmp jump_E667

jump_0627:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_FF29
	mov A, #02h	;   2
	movx @DPTR, A
	inc DPTR
	mov A, #00h	;   0
	movx @DPTR, A
jump_0631:
	jb 23h.5, jump_063C
	jnb 24h.5, jump_063A
	jnb 24h.4, jump_0631
jump_063A:
	setb 24h.4
jump_063C:
	jnb 24h.4, jump_0641
	clr C
	ret

jump_0641:
	jnb 28h.0, jump_0646
	sjmp jump_064B

jump_0646:
	dec 08h
	ljmp jump_E57F

jump_064B:
	jnb 28h.1, jump_0664
	mov R1, #0CCh	; 204  -52 'Ì'
	lcall jump_2F9A
	clr 23h.2
jump_0655:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_EA46
	movx A, @DPTR
	xrl A, 1Bh
	jz jump_0664
	lcall jump_2F8B
	inc 1Bh
	sjmp jump_0655

jump_0664:
	setb 23h.2
	setb C
	ret

jump_0668:
	mov R1, #0C3h	; 195  -61 'Ã'
	lcall jump_2F9A
jump_066D:
	clr C
	ret

	push 08h
	jnb 23h.6, jump_0676
	sjmp jump_06A9

jump_0676:
	mov 1Ah, #40h	;  64 '@'
	mov 1Dh, #0FFh	; 255   -1 'ÿ'
	mov 08h, #00h	;   0
	jb 24h.5, jump_0684
	sjmp jump_06A9

jump_0684:
	lcall jump_E6AC
	jnc jump_068D
	pop 08h
	setb C
	ret

jump_068D:
	mov R1, 08h
	mov A, R1
	anl A, #07h	;   7
	jz jump_0696
	sjmp jump_069E

jump_0696:
	jb 24h.5, jump_069B
	sjmp jump_06A9

jump_069B:
	lcall jump_2FB2
jump_069E:
	inc 08h
	mov A, 08h
	xrl A, #20h	;  32 ' '
	jz jump_06A9
	ljmp jump_E67E

jump_06A9:
	pop 08h
	clr C
	ret

	mov DPTR, #dptr_FE4B
	movx A, @DPTR
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_FE4C
	movx A, @DPTR
	movx @DPTR, A
	clr 23h.5
	clr 24h.4
	mov DPTR, #dptr_FE4F
	mov A, #87h	; 135 -121
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_FE3F
	mov A, #00h	;   0
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_FE3F
	mov A, #00h	;   0
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_FE3F
	mov A, #10h	;  16
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_FE3F
	mov A, #0Fh	;  15
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_FE56
	mov A, #0Fh	;  15
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_FE43
	mov A, #01h	;   1
	movx @DPTR, A
jump_06E5:
	jb 23h.5, jump_06F0
	jnb 24h.5, jump_06EE
	jnb 24h.4, jump_06E5
jump_06EE:
	setb 24h.4
jump_06F0:
	jnb 24h.4, jump_06F5
	clr C
	ret

jump_06F5:
	mov R1, #00h	;   0
	mov DPTR, #dptr_FE45
	movx A, @DPTR
	anl A, #0F0h	; 240  -16 'ð'
	orl A, R1
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_FE4C
jump_0702:
	jnb 24h.5, jump_070C
	movx A, @DPTR
	jnb 0E0h.5, jump_0702
	setb C
	sjmp jump_070D

jump_070C:
	clr C
jump_070D:
	jc jump_0710
	ret

jump_0710:
	mov R0, #0B4h	; 180  -76 '´'
	lcall jump_2FA9
	mov DPTR, #dptr_EA43
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov DPTR, #dptr_FE3F
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov R0, #17h	;  23
	mov R5, #09h	;   9
jump_0721:
	mov A, @R0
	inc R0
	mov DPTR, #dptr_FE3F
	movx @DPTR, A
	djnz R5, jump_0721
	mov A, #0FFh	; 255   -1 'ÿ'
	mov DPTR, #dptr_FE3F
	movx @DPTR, A
	movx @DPTR, A
	movx @DPTR, A
	movx @DPTR, A
	clr 23h.5
	clr 24h.4
	movx @DPTR, A
jump_0737:
	jb 23h.5, jump_0742
	jnb 24h.5, jump_0740
	jnb 24h.4, jump_0737
jump_0740:
	setb 24h.4
jump_0742:
	jnb 24h.4, jump_0747
	clr C
	ret

jump_0747:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_FE4D
jump_074A:
	jnb 24h.5, jump_0754
	movx A, @DPTR
	jnb 0E0h.6, jump_074A
	setb C
	sjmp jump_0755

jump_0754:
	clr C
jump_0755:
	mov R1, #55h	;  85 'U'
	mov R2, #01h	;   1
	lcall jump_2FAC
	jc jump_0760
	sjmp jump_0773

jump_0760:
	lcall jump_2FAF
	jnb 24h.4, jump_0768
	clr C
	ret

jump_0768:
	mov A, R7
	jb 0E0h.0, jump_0773
	anl A, #0C0h	; 192  -64 'À'
	cjne A, #80h, jump_0773	; 128 -128
	sjmp jump_0775

jump_0773:
	clr C
	ret

jump_0775:
	setb C
	ret

	jnb 23h.6, jump_077C
	sjmp jump_0786

jump_077C:
	lcall jump_E787
	jc jump_0784
	ljmp jump_E785

jump_0784:
	setb C
	ret

jump_0786:
	clr C
	ret

	push 08h
	mov 08h, #00h	;   0
	jb 24h.5, jump_0792
	sjmp jump_07B7

jump_0792:
	lcall jump_2FA0
	jnc jump_079A
	pop 08h
	ret

jump_079A:
	mov R1, 08h
	mov A, R1
	anl A, #07h	;   7
	jz jump_07A3
	sjmp jump_07AC

jump_07A3:
	mov C, 24h.5
	jc jump_07A9
	sjmp jump_07B7

jump_07A9:
	lcall jump_2FB2
jump_07AC:
	inc 08h
	mov A, 08h
	xrl A, #20h	;  32 ' '
	jz jump_07B7
	ljmp jump_E78C

jump_07B7:
	pop 08h
	clr C
	ret

	orl A, R5
	anl 2Dh, #52h	;  82 'R'
	anl A, @R1
	jb 24h.0, jump_0818
	jb 24h.0, jump_081B
	acall jump_0130
	jnb 26h.0, jump_0830

end
